/5-Compartment Lambskin/

items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
New in stock 🅰️🅰️ TILLY Shoulder Bag〰️
CE 2024 Chinese New Year Limited Edition TILLY Handbag.
The latest rounded shoulder bag, continuing the tone of the CE CROQUE handbag. This minimalist style handbag is adorned with TRIOMPHE metal hardware. It can hold a phone, car keys, cosmetics, and other essentials. The capacity is sufficient. The bag shape is structured, with a zipper closure. It has 1 main compartment and 1 interior flat pocket. The shoulder strap is adjustable. Compared to the previous Tilly, this one is more retro and cute 😍!
Model No.: 115703
Color: Patent Black (with original packaging)
Dimensions: 22x13.5x4

items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
New Arrival ❤️ Woven Small Square Bag
Most existing styles are a bit trendy
and a bit hard to style
So I picked this one!
This small square bag is similar to the Cloud Bag in small size
But! It is lighter than the Cloud Bag and has much more capacity
This is a little cutie that crosses all age groups
I like it, Mom likes it, and even Grandma will like it!
And the large woven pattern won't look old-fashioned~
As someone who is half a fashionista, I think
this is a very excellent small bag!
Specially bought a ZP to develop
Model 3001S Size 22*15*8cm

New arrival🅰️🅰️ TEEN LOLA Bestseller❇️
CE Fall/Winter New TEEN LOLA Logo Print Handbag👜.
Another masterpiece from the Triumph family, Teen Lola is here. TRIO MPHE magnetic closure, 1 interior compartment, 1 interior flat pocket, detachable and adjustable long shoulder strap. The bag exudes ultimate French elegance and can easily hold a phone, compact powder, lipstick, card holder, and other daily essentials! Not only is it small, exquisite, and cute, but it can also be carried by hand, crossbody, or over the shoulder for various looks🫶🏻
Style: 119533
Color: Khaki (with original packaging)
Size: 20x11.5x5cm

Celine 23 Early Spring Lisa Style Mini ~besace

Compared to the relatively mini style, the handle design is both playful and cute, a style you'll fall in love with at first glance, carrying it for photos is full of elegance. Capacity: Large phone doesn't fit, can hold keys, tissues, compact powder, 💄

Size: 15.5-11.5-5 (with original packaging)

items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
Goyard ♛ Card bag 🏷 Essential for daily wear 💳
🔖G0YARD (Goyard) was founded in 1853, with over 160 years of history. The fabric is woven from hemp, cotton, and hemp fibers, then coated with glossy shellac, making it waterproof, sturdy, and durable. It is highly favored by celebrities, royalty, and nobility 🎉🎉
Uses exclusive wallet-matching custom glossy leather ✅ Perfect diagonal stitching 🧵✅ The yellow interior is custom top-grain cowhide [⚠️Not PU ❌Not split leather ❌]
Size: 10.5*7.3 cm

items.name_cn:
Genuine Quality
Anjou Mini Limited Customization — Coral Pink
Double-sided mini tote. The patterned side uses custom high-quality rain-dampened linen consistent with ZP, finished with a glossy resin coating [Witty] The grain texture rivals ZP, achieving a look that is both glossy and matte 🤟 The leather is top-grain calfskin 👛 soft and non-irritating 💪 Plus, with custom hand-painting, one bag offers three styles. Includes bag charm, card holder 🎀 ➕ gift box 🎁 ➕ upgraded manual 💌
Size: Opening 28cm, Base 20*Height 20*Base Width 10cm
🔎020660
